passes.name: evidence_integrity_repair
passes.evidence: Prior 14:45 structured manifest and run log now record pushed commit 233e7506180b9ab3c24c8578eeff687d29233a48 instead of pending commit fields.

passes.name: canonical_workspace_local_smoke
passes.evidence: tests/workspace-browser-smoke.test.mjs passed against WORKSPACE_SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8788; in-app browser smoke confirmed visible title/H1/sign-in fields/guide link with no console errors.

passes.name: upload_denial_hardening
passes.evidence: tests/evidence-drive-file.integration.test.mjs now covers missing submission, cross-student denial, non-student role denial, empty/oversized files, missing credentials, provider exception, and no evidence-row insertion on failures.

passes.name: production_and_automation_closeout
passes.evidence: Production-surface, generated-output, route-inventory, Cloudflare static, QoL doctor/smoke, aggregate check, JSON parse, and git diff checks passed; report schema now warns against stale pending commit fields.

login_status.before: Canonical workspace source and signed-out UI existed, but no local browser smoke was committed and prior evidence asked for browser proof.
login_status.after: Signed-out canonical workspace is source-tested, local-HTTP-tested, and in-app-browser-tested with visible Senior Project Workspace H1, email/password fields, return-to-guide link, no forbidden visible dev copy, and no console errors.
login_status.browser_login_blocker: Ignored fake .test credential file exists, but the local Pages/D1 target returned invalid_credentials for the student account. Passwords were not printed.
login_status.session_restore: source-tested through /api/auth/me and local signed-out /api/auth/me 401; credential-backed restore not browser-verified
login_status.role_aware_rendering: source-tested in workspace.js and backend route tests; signed-in browser role sections still blocked by local credential/D1 mismatch
login_status.logout: local signed-out POST /api/auth/logout verified harmless; signed-in browser logout still blocked by local credential/D1 mismatch

upload_status.before: Upload route had success, unsupported-file, provider-failure, resumable, and missing-session coverage, but several denial and no-provider-call cases were missing.
upload_status.after: Upload route has integration coverage for missing session, missing submission, student-other-submission denial, non-student role denial, unsupported file, empty file, oversized file, missing Drive config, missing Drive credentials, token exchange failure, provider exception, provider upload failure, successful redacted metadata, and resumable upload.
upload_status.evidence_link_status: workspace source posts to /api/submissions/:id/evidence; browser evidence-link submission remains credential-blocked
upload_status.file_upload_status: source/integration-tested; real Drive upload not live-verified
upload_status.unsupported_file_type_status: verified no token exchange/provider call/evidence row/audit noise
upload_status.missing_config_secrets_status: verified 503 for missing Drive root config and missing Drive credentials with safe audit metadata
upload_status.resumable_upload_status: verified source/integration path for >5MB and pre-provider rejection over 20MB

browser_smoke_status.in_app_browser: passed signed-out visible UI and console-error check
browser_smoke_status.signed_in_browser: blocked by local invalid_credentials from ignored fake .test account file

role_scope_denial_test_status.student_owns_submission: verified success path with safe metadata
role_scope_denial_test_status.student_other_submission: verified 403 with evidence_upload_denied audit and no evidence row
role_scope_denial_test_status.non_student_upload: verified mentor, program_teacher, admin, and misc_admin receive 403 before provider calls
role_scope_denial_test_status.missing_submission: verified 404 with no provider call and no evidence row
role_scope_denial_test_status.drive_config_missing: verified 503 with audit and no evidence row
role_scope_denial_test_status.drive_credentials_missing: verified 503 with safe credentialParts audit and no evidence row
role_scope_denial_test_status.token_exchange_failure: verified 502 with safe audit and no evidence row
role_scope_denial_test_status.provider_upload_failure: verified 502 with safe status audit and no evidence row
role_scope_denial_test_status.provider_exception: verified 502 with safe message audit and no evidence row
role_scope_denial_test_status.successful_upload: verified evidence row + audit + response redaction

production_copy_surface_status.public_navigation: normal public app navigation points to workspace.html for the actual workspace; alpha/account remain out of normal public navigation
production_copy_surface_status.alpha_account_preview_classification: alpha.html is internal-alpha, account.html is internal-smoke, app-preview.html is preview/non-canonical
production_copy_surface_status.dev_language_cleanup: workspace source/static/browser checks found no Codex/prompt/mock/fake/sample/placeholder/TODO/FIXME/scaffold/internal QA visible copy

validation_commands.command: In-app browser credential-backed student login using ignored .secrets/test-accounts-2026-05-18.json
validation_commands.notes: The local Pages/D1 target returned invalid_credentials; password was not printed.
Built titan-blend and back-to-basics outputs with 27 top-level entries each.
Route inventory regenerated; rerun after builds left generated inventory unchanged.
Public companion and stakeholder review outputs match deterministic source expectations.
3 site roots and manifest pages present.
Production route inventory up to date.
Static Wrangler/D1 config passed; live Cloudflare verification blocked by missing token.
Doctor passed while reporting the expected dirty state from this in-progress run.
Aggregate check passed with 129 tests passing and 1 opt-in local-server smoke skipped; Cloudflare live remained blocked by missing token.
No whitespace errors; Git printed line-ending normalization warnings only.
Changed JSON parsed before first commit.

blockers.message: LIVE_CLOUDFLARE_BLOCKED_NO_TOKEN: Cloudflare live verification blocked because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is not set. Static Wrangler configuration passed; live Pages/D1 existence was not verified.

Real workspace upload/download through Google Drive remains blocked until GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY are configured in the target Cloudflare environment and verified through /api/health or drive probe.

Ignored fake .test credential file exists, but the local Pages/D1 target returned invalid_credentials for the student account; align local D1 test account seed state before signed-in browser role/upload/logout smoke.

commit.closeout_manifest_note: This structured manifest is committed after the implementation/evidence-repair commit; the final closeout commit SHA is reported in the run log/final response because a commit cannot contain its own hash.

next_best_passes: Align local fake .test account credentials with local D1, then browser-test workspace login, session restore, role sections, evidence link submission, truthful upload-blocked state, and logout.
Configure Cloudflare Pages Drive secrets and verify real workspace upload/download against the evidence root, including one >5MB resumable upload.
Add canonical workspace browser coverage for program_teacher, mentor, admin, misc_admin, and no-role users once credentialed local state is aligned.
Broaden no-hidden-core-content route coverage across every public Student/Teacher guide page.
Add browser-level unsupported-file and storage-not-configured UI checks once signed-in workspace smoke is unblocked.
